bots.name: AddSearchBot
bots.description: Crawler for AddSearch's hosted site-search service. It indexes the pages of customer sites so AddSearch can serve search results for them, obeys robots.txt rules written for the AddSearchBot token, and AddSearch publishes the fixed addresses it crawls from for allowlisting.

bots.name: AdIdxBot
bots.description: Microsoft's crawler for Bing Ads / Microsoft Advertising. It crawls ads and follows through to the advertised landing pages for quality control, with both desktop and mobile variants.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 7_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/537.51.1 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/7.0 Mobile/11A465 Safari/9537.53 (compatible; adidxbot/2.0; +http://www.bing.com/bingbot.htm)

bots.name: Algolia Crawler
bots.description: Algolia's Crawler, which visits a customer's pages, extracts search-relevant content, and pushes it to Algolia search indices. Algolia documents a fixed User-Agent token and a single static egress IP address for allowlisting.

bots.name: Amazon AdBot
bots.description: Amazon's advertising crawler. It scans web pages that request ads from Amazon's advertising systems, collecting page content for Amazon's classification systems to maintain brand safety and improve ad relevance.

bots.name: Applebot
bots.description: Apple's web crawler, used to index content for Siri, Spotlight Suggestions, and Safari's search features.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 8_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/600.1.4 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/8.0 Mobile/12B410 Safari/600.1.4 (Applebot/0.1; +http://www.apple.com/go/applebot)

bots.name: Baiduspider
bots.description: Baidu's primary web crawler, fetching pages for Baidu Search indexing.

bots.name: Bingbot
bots.description: Microsoft's primary web crawler, fetching pages for Bing Search indexing.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; bingbot/2.0; +http://www.bing.com/bingbot.htm) Safari/537.36

bots.name: BingPreview
bots.description: Microsoft fetcher used to generate page snapshots for previews in Bing search results. Runs both desktop and mobile variants.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.1; WOW64) AppleWebKit/534+ (KHTML, like Gecko) BingPreview/1.0b
Mozilla/5.0 (Windows Phone 8.1; ARM; Trident/7.0; Touch; rv:11.0; IEMobile/11.0; NOKIA; Lumia 530) like Gecko BingPreview/1.0b

bots.name: coccocbot
bots.description: Cốc Cốc's web crawler, fetching pages for the Vietnamese Cốc Cốc search engine. Separate web and image sub-bots share the same verification domain.

bots.name: DuckDuckBot
bots.description: DuckDuckGo's web crawler, used to improve DuckDuckGo's search results.

bots.name: Geedo Product Search
bots.description: GeedoShopProductFinder is the crawler for Geedo, a product-search engine that indexes publicly accessible product pages from online stores and follows robots.txt rules.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; GeedoShopProductFinder) Chrome/142.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; GeedoProductSearch; +http://www.geedo.com/product-search.html) Chrome/79.0.3945.88 Safari/537.36

bots.name: Storebot-Google
bots.description: Google's crawler for Google Shopping surfaces, including the Shopping tab in Google Search and shopping.google.com. It crawls product and store pages to populate shopping results.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64; Storebot-Google/1.0) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/79.0.3945.88 Safari/537.36
Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 8.0; Pixel 2 Build/OPD3.170816.012; Storebot-Google/1.0) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/81.0.4044.138 Mobile Safari/537.36

bots.name: Google-InspectionTool
bots.description: Google crawler used by Search testing tools such as the URL Inspection tool in Search Console and the Rich Result Test. Fetches pages on demand to show how Google Search renders them; it has no effect on ranking.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 6.0.1; Nexus 5X Build/MMB29P) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/W.X.Y.Z Mobile Safari/537.36 (compatible; Google-InspectionTool/1.0)

bots.name: Google special-case crawlers
bots.description: A group of Google crawlers that operate under separate agreements between the crawled site and a specific Google product (AdsBot, AdSense, Google Safety scanning, and similar). Several members of this group ignore the wildcard robots.txt rule and must be targeted explicitly.

bots.name: Googlebot
bots.description: Google's primary web crawler, fetching pages for Google Search indexing.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; Googlebot/2.1; +http://www.google.com/bot.html) Chrome/125.0.6422.26 Safari/537.36

bots.name: Googlebot Image
bots.description: Google's image crawler, which fetches images for Google Images and image features in Search. It is a distinct crawler from Googlebot with its own robots.txt token, though rules for Googlebot also apply to it.

bots.name: Googlebot Video
bots.description: Google's video crawler, which fetches video content for Google Search video features. It is a distinct crawler from Googlebot with its own robots.txt token, though rules for Googlebot also apply to it.

bots.name: GoogleOther
bots.description: Google's generic crawler family (GoogleOther, GoogleOther-Image, GoogleOther-Video), used by various Google product teams for fetching publicly accessible content. Robots.txt rules addressed to it do not affect Google Search.

bots.name: 360Spider
bots.description: 360Spider is the web-search crawler of 360 Search (so.com), the search engine operated by Chinese internet company Qihoo 360. The operator also runs 360Spider-Image and 360Spider-Video for image and video search.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.1) AppleWebKit/537.1 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/21.0.1180.89 Safari/537.1; 360Spider

bots.name: IONOS Crawler
bots.description: IONOS Crawler (IonCrawl) continuously crawls publicly accessible domains to generate insights into how they are used, which IONOS uses to improve and expand its hosting products. IONOS documents reverse-DNS verification and deletes crawled data after 60 days.

bots.name: Kagibot
bots.description: Kagi's web crawler, fetching pages for the paid Kagi search engine. Kagi publishes a fixed, small set of source IPs rather than a CIDR feed.

bots.name: Linespider
bots.description: LINE's crawler. It fetches web pages to support LINE's search features and content services, and adheres to the Robots Exclusion Protocol outlined in robots.txt.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; Linespider/1.1; +https://lin.ee/4dwXkTH) Chrome/W.X.Y.Z Safari/537.36

bots.name: Marginalia
bots.description: The crawler behind Marginalia Search, an independent search engine focused on older, text-heavy, and non-commercial web pages. Identifies itself by a bare URL rather than a conventional bot token.

bots.name: MetaJobBot
bots.description: MetaJobBot is the focused web crawler operated by the METAJob job meta-search engine. It searches websites for job listings to include in the METAJob index.

bots.name: MojeekBot
bots.description: Mojeek's web crawler, fetching pages for the independent Mojeek search engine index.

bots.name: Yeti
bots.description: Naver's web crawler, fetching pages for Naver Search indexing across South Korea's largest search engine.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; Yeti/1.1; +https://naver.me/spd) Chrome/106.0.5249.0 Safari/537.36

bots.name: Openindex Spider
bots.description: Openindex operates a web-crawling cluster (Apache Nutch on an Apache Hadoop cluster) for research and development of universal and focused search engines. The crawler respects robots.txt and the Crawl-delay directive and identifies itself in the User-Agent.

bots.name: PetalBot
bots.description: Huawei's web crawler, fetching pages for the Petal Search engine used in Huawei's mobile services.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 7.0;) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Mobile Safari/537.36 (compatible; PetalBot;+https://webmaster.petalsearch.com/site/petalbot)

bots.name: PiplBot
bots.description: PiplBot is the web-indexing crawler operated by Pipl, an identity and people-search service. It retrieves and indexes publicly available information, including content behind searchable databases, to build Pipl's people-search index.

bots.name: Quantcastbot
bots.description: Quantcast's advertising crawler. It crawls websites to extract page content for interest-based audience categorization and to run quality-assurance checks on advertisement landing pages.

bots.name: Qwantbot
bots.description: Qwant's web crawler, fetching pages for the privacy-focused Qwant search engine. Older crawls identify as Qwantify; current documentation uses the Qwantbot name.

bots.name: SeekportBot
bots.description: The crawler for the Seekport search engine, operated by SISTRIX (Bonn, Germany). It fetches pages to build Seekport's search index and follows the Disallow directives in robots.txt.

bots.name: SemanticScholarBot
bots.description: SemanticScholarBot is the crawler for Semantic Scholar, an academic search engine built by the Allen Institute for AI. It crawls the web to find scholarly PDFs and metadata for indexing.

bots.name: SeznamBot
bots.description: Seznam's web crawler, fetching pages for the Seznam.cz search engine used primarily in the Czech Republic.

bots.name: Sogou Spider
bots.description: Sogou Spider is the web crawler for Sogou, a major Chinese search engine (owned by Tencent). It crawls and indexes web pages, news, and images to build Sogou's search index.

bots.name: StractBot
bots.description: The crawler for Stract, an open-source search engine. Stract documents the crawler's user agent and robots.txt behavior but publishes no IP list or reverse-DNS verification method.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; StractBot/0.2; open source search engine; +https://stract.com/webmasters)

bots.name: TinEye
bots.description: TinEye-bot is the web crawler operated by TinEye, the reverse image search engine built by Idee Inc. It crawls the web to discover and index images for TinEye's image-matching search service.

bots.name: Webzio
bots.description: Crawler for Webz.io (formerly Webhose.io), a web-data provider that collects publicly available content to build structured data feeds. Webz.io publishes no IP ranges, so requests cannot be verified.

bots.name: Yahoo! Slurp
bots.description: Slurp is Yahoo Search's web crawler. It crawls and indexes pages for Yahoo Search results and also gathers content for Yahoo News, Finance, and Sports.

bots.name: Yahoo! JAPAN Crawler
bots.description: Web crawler operated by Yahoo! JAPAN (LY Corporation) to collect pages for its Japanese search index and related services. It identifies itself with Y!J-prefixed user-agent tokens and follows the Robots Exclusion Protocol.

bots.name: YandexRenderResourcesBot
bots.description: Yandex robot that loads resources such as JavaScript and CSS needed to render pages during crawling for Yandex Search.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; YandexRenderResourcesBot/1.0; +http://yandex.com/bots) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/108.0.0.0

bots.name: YandexBot
bots.description: Yandex's primary web crawler, fetching pages for Yandex Search indexing.
